creator: c.brinkhaus@t-online.de
text:
Created attachment 167510
Patch which should fix the faq document

There is a link in
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/faq/x.html#idp64175568
11.14. How do I install a splash screen and where do I find them?
The detailed answer for this question can be found in the Boot Time Splash Screens section of the FreeBSD Handbook.

It points to
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/boot-blocks.html#boot-splash
instead of
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/boot-splash.html

Kind regards,
Christoph
